title: aneilema scaberrimum
intro: Aneilema scaberrimum is a plant species commonly known as the hairy aneilema, belonging to the family Commelinaceae. The hairy aneilema has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin infections and wounds. Hairy aneilema can be prepared as a herbal medicine through infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
